predicates.name: holds_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person holds Belgian nationality (directly asserted as a background fact in a case).

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

predicates.name: is_present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory (directly asserted as a background fact in a case).

predicates.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
predicates.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without satisfying access or residence conditions.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the request for international protection.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real (directly asserted as a background fact).

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_exists
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, established after individual examination on the basis of one or more objective criteria.

predicates.name: has_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_authority
predicates.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

predicates.name: own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The national authority of the foreigner's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The foreigner falls under the category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The foreigner is identified: holds a valid travel/identity document, or is recognised by their national authority willing to issue a laissez-passer, or falls under a ministerial laissez-passer nationality category.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria listed in paragraph 2 for risk of absconding is present for the person.

predicates.name: criterion_1_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(1) is present: no timely residence or protection application after illegal entry/stay.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

predicates.name: no_international_protection_request_in_time
predicates.description: The person did not submit a request for international protection within the legally provided period.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_forged_documents_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or forged documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: criterion_2_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(2) is present: the person used false information, forged documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for implementing or supervising regulations on access, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: criterion_3_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(3) is present: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the relevant authorities.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_refoulement_removal
predicates.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with a transfer, refoulement, or removal measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refoulement_removal
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refoulement, or removal measure.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refoulement, or removal.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refoulement, or removal.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_freedom_restricting_measure_public_order
predicates.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_freedom_restricting_measure_public_order
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with an equivalent measure taken by another Member State.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with an equivalent measure taken by another Member State.

predicates.name: criterion_4_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(4) is present: the person indicated unwillingness or already failed to comply with a relevant measure.

predicates.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: criterion_5_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(5) is present: the person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_refusal_of_entry_or_residence
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_end_of_residence
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a decision ending their residence.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_refoulement_or_removal
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refoulement or removal measure.

predicates.name: criterion_6_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(6) is present: the person submitted a new application immediately after a relevant adverse decision or measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound state after submitting an international protection request.

predicates.name: criterion_7_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(7) is present: the person concealed prior fingerprints in another Dublin-bound state.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: criterion_8_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(8) is present: the person submitted multiple applications with negative outcomes.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_protection_request_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another Dublin-bound state.

predicates.name: criterion_9_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(9) is present: the person concealed a prior protection request in another Dublin-bound state.

predicates.name: declared_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose
predicates.description: The person declared that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a protection request or residence application.

predicates.name: file_shows_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose
predicates.description: It appears from the person's file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a protection request or residence application.

predicates.name: criterion_10_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(10) is present: the person's declared or apparent purpose differs from the purpose of their application.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: criterion_11_present
predicates.description: Criterion 2(11) is present: the person is subject to a fine for a manifestly unlawful appeal.
